title: Better Blue Ancient Debris [32x32] [Faithful Addon]
description: A texture pack that makes Ancient Debris blue so you can see it better
body:
This texture Pack (or Ressource pack) helps you to find Ancient Debris in your Minecraft world or server. It changes the color from the Ancient Debris from the bad red to a nice-looking and good visible blue, so you will never miss an Ancient Debris you mined.



This ist the 32x32 Edition of the texture pack. The original, non-colored textures are used from the Faithful 32x32 Pack (https://faithfulpack.net/). There is also a 16x16 and a 64x64  Version of the texture pack.



To Install the Pack, go in your Minecraft settings to a menu called "Ressource Packs". Put it by Drag-and-Drop intro your Minecraft window. It will appear in the left side of the window. Do a double-click on it or click the triangle, when you hover over the pack's name. Once it is on the right side, make sure it is the first pack in the list. Otherwise it's possible that the pack doesn't work. To bring it to the top, simply click the triangle faced to the top when you hover over it, until it is the first pack.



Have fun with it!
